lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਕਿਆ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਕਰੇ ਸੋਇ ਸਾਲਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: keetaa kiaa saalaaheeai kare soe saalaeh |
lines.english: Why praise the created being? Praise the One who created all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕੀ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak ekee baaharaa doojaa daataa naeh |
lines.english: O Nanak, there is no other Giver, except the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਤਾ ਸੋ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਜਿ ਸਭਸੈ ਦੇ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: daataa so saalaaheeai ji sabhasai de aadhaar |
lines.english: Praise the Great Giver, who gives sustenence to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤਾ ਸੋ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਤਾ ਆਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: karataa so saalaaheeai jin keetaa aakaar |
lines.english: Praise the Creator Lord, who created the creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਿ ਸਦੀਵ ਹੈ ਪੂਰਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਭੰਡਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak aap sadeev hai pooraa jis bhanddaar |
lines.english: O Nanak, the treasure of the Eternal Lord is over-flowing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਾ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vaddaa kar saalaaheeai ant na paaraavaar |2|
lines.english: Praise and honor the One, who has no end or limitation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam nidhaan hai seviai sukh paaee |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is a treasure. Serving it, peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਉਚਰਾਂ ਪਤਿ ਸਿਉ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਂਈ ॥
lines.translit: naam niranjan ucharaan pat siau ghar jaanee |
lines.english: I chant the Name of the Immaculate Lord, so that I may go home with honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh baanee naam hai naam ridai vasaaee |
lines.english: The Word of the Gurmukh is the Naam; I enshrine the Naam within my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੋਇ ਨਾਮੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak aap deaal hoe naame liv laaee |4|
lines.english: O Nanak, if the Lord becomes merciful, the mortal lovingly tunes in to the Naam. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਪੰਖੇਰੂ ਵਸਿ ਹੋਇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਧਿਆਈਁ ॥
lines.translit: mat pankheroo vas hoe satiguroo dhiaaee |
lines.english: The bird of the intellect comes under one's control, by meditating on the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਕੈਸਾ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਜਿ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis siau kaisaa bolanaa ji aape jaanai jaan |
lines.english: How can we speak of Him? Only He knows Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੀਰੀ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਨਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸੋ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: cheeree jaa kee naa firai saahib so paravaan |
lines.english: His decree cannot be challenged; He is our Supreme Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੀਰੀ ਜਿਸ ਕੀ ਚਲਣਾ ਮੀਰ ਮਲਕ ਸਲਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: cheeree jis kee chalanaa meer malak salaar |
lines.english: By His Decree, even kings, nobles and commanders must step down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸਾਈ ਭਲੀ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai naanakaa saaee bhalee kaar |
lines.english: Whatever is pleasing to His Will, O Nanak, is a good deed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕਾ ਫੁਰਮਾਣੁ ਹੋਇ ਉਠੀ ਕਰਲੈ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: saahib kaa furamaan hoe utthee karalai paeh |
lines.english: When the Order comes from our Lord and Master, all must rise up and take to the road.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਾ ਚੀਰੀ ਚਲਣਾ ਹਥਿ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa cheeree chalanaa hath tinaa kichh naeh |
lines.english: By His Decree, we walk; nothing rests in our hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਲੇ ਆਵਹਿ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸਦੇ ਉਠੀ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ghale aaveh naanakaa sade utthee jaeh |1|
lines.english: Those who are sent, come, O Nanak; when they are called back, they depart and go. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਚੀਰੀ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤੇਹਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jehaa cheeree likhiaa tehaa hukam kamaeh |
lines.english: As His Decree is issued, so is His Command obeyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁੰਜੀ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਦਿਤੀਆ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਮਿਲੇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: kunjee jin kau diteea tinaa mile bhanddaar |
lines.english: Those who are blessed with the key - they alone receive the treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਫਤਿ ਜਿਨਾ ਕਉ ਬਖਸੀਐ ਸੇਈ ਪੋਤੇਦਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sifat jinaa kau bakhaseeai seee potedaar |
lines.english: Those whom the Lord blesses with His Praises, are the true keepers of the treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਭੰਡਾਰੀ ਹੂ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਕਲਹਿ ਤੇ ਕੀਅਹਿ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeh bhanddaaree hoo gun nikaleh te keeeh paravaan |
lines.english: That treasure, from which virtue wells up - that treasure is approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਕਉ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: nadar tinaa kau naanakaa naam jinaa neesaan |2|
lines.english: Those who are blessed by His Glance of Grace, O Nanak, bear the Insignia of the Naam. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਈਐ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਨੁ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sun sun man vasaaeeai boojhai jan koee |
lines.english: Listening and hearing, It is enshrined in the mind; how rare is that humble being who realizes it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naam niranjan niramalaa suniai sukh hoee |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is immaculate and pure; hearing it, peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਕਉ ਨਾਮ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa kau naam adhaar hai naame sukh hoee |
lines.english: His devotees have the Support of His Name; in His Name, they find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹਦਿਆ ਉਠਦਿਆ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bahadiaa utthadiaa na visarai saachaa sach soee |
lines.english: Sitting down and standing up, I shall never forget Him, the Truest of the true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak man tan rav rahiaa guramukh har soee |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, He permeates and pervades mind and body; He is the Lord, the Guru's Word. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੁਲੀਅਹਿ ਤੋਲ ਜੇ ਜੀਉ ਪਿਛੈ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: naanak tuleeeh tol je jeeo pichhai paaeeai |
lines.english: O Nanak, the weight is weighed out, when the soul is placed on the scale.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰ ਹਉਲੀ ਮਤੀ ਹਉਲੇ ਬੋਲ ॥
lines.translit: hor haulee matee haule bol |
lines.english: Other intellectualisms are lightweight; other words are lightweight as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸੁ ਨ ਪੁਜਹਿ ਬੋਲ ਜੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਪੂਰਾ ਕਰਿ ਮਿਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: eikas na pujeh bol je poore pooraa kar milai |
lines.english: Nothing is equal to speaking of the One, who perfectly unites us with the Perfect Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਾ ਆਖਣੁ ਭਾਰਾ ਤੋਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaddaa aakhan bhaaraa tol |
lines.english: To call Him glorious and great carries such a heavy weight.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੋਲਾ ਮਾਸਾ ਰਤਕ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tolaa maasaa ratak paae |
lines.english: What weights can balance the scale?

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਤੀ ਪਾਣੀ ਪਰਬਤ ਭਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dharatee paanee parabat bhaar |
lines.english: The weight of the earth, water and mountains

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੁਛਿਆ ਦੇਇ ਪੁਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak puchhiaa dee pujaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, when questioned, the answer is given.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਕੰਡੈ ਤੋਲੈ ਸੁਨਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kiau kanddai tolai suniaar |
lines.english: - how can the goldsmith weigh it on the scale?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਰਖ ਅੰਧਿਆ ਅੰਧੀ ਧਾਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: moorakh andhiaa andhee dhaat |
lines.english: The blind fool is running around, leading the blind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਹਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਕਹਾਇਨਿ ਆਪੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: keh keh kehan kahaaein aap |1|
lines.english: The more they say, the more they expose themselves. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਆਖਿ ਆਖਹਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਭਾਖਹਿ ਅਰਧ ਉਰਧ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: eik aakh aakheh sabad bhaakheh aradh uradh din raat |
lines.english: Some speak with their mouths and chant the Word of the Shabad - the low and the high, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣਿ ਅਉਖਾ ਸੁਨਣਿ ਅਉਖਾ ਆਖਿ ਨ ਜਾਪੀ ਆਖਿ ॥
lines.translit: aakhan aaukhaa sunan aaukhaa aakh na jaapee aakh |
lines.english: It is difficult to chant it; it is difficult to listen to it. It cannot be chanted with the mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਕਾਰਣ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੇ ਘਟ ਅਉਘਟ ਘਟ ਥਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kaaran karataa kare ghatt aaughatt ghatt thaap |
lines.english: The Creator Lord does all deeds; He is established in the hearts of the high and the low.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕਿਹੁ ਹੋਇ ਤ ਕਿਹੁ ਦਿਸੈ ਜਾਪੈ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਜਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: je kihu hoe ta kihu disai jaapai roop na jaat |
lines.english: If He were something, then He would be visible. His form and state cannot be seen.
